sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_decimal (value String, converted Nullable(Decimal(9, 4)));
INSERT INTO test_decimal (value, converted) VALUES ('123.4567', toDecimal32OrNull('123.4567', 4));
UPDATE test_decimal SET converted = toDecimal32OrNull(value, 2) WHERE value = '123.4567';
SELECT value, toDecimal32OrNull(value, 5) AS decimal_value FROM test_decimal;
SELECT toDecimal32OrNull('NaN', 3) AS invalid_case, toDecimal32OrNull('9999999999', 0) AS overflow_case;
